source.provenance: MadDM 3.2 relic run with the Majorana-phase-consistent param card (chi2 signed eigenvalue -523.03: ZNMIX row 2 carried as +i x row in IMZNMIX, per SARAH convention ZN.M.ZN^T = diag(+|m|)). Analytic h/Z chi1-chi1 couplings cross-checked against arXiv:2506.19062 Eq. 7 (c_h = -0.12223, exact match to Hellmann-Feynman dm_chi1/dv; c_Z magnitude agrees to 0.4%).
source.paper_note: The paper contains NO relic benchmark: Fig. 1 plots sigma_SI with points only color-coded by relic fraction, and there is no benchmark table or quoted Omega h^2 anywhere. The previous central 0.292 was a MadDM output-PARSER smoke-fixture number from an early /demo playtest, mis-cited to 'II Fig. 1' in the repo's initial commit.

history.why: parser smoke-fixture value with fabricated paper citation; never a physics prediction
run with yh1 silently zeroed (MINPAR-vs-BSMPARAMS silent-zero bug)
correct couplings but real ZNMIX for the negative chi2 eigenvalue (missing Majorana phase i); corrupted chi2-exchange interference made chi1chi1->Zh spuriously dominant at 92%

maddm_3_2_phase_corrected.provenance: relic-dive 2026-07-06: MadDM relic with the phase-corrected card; the pre-fix baseline (real ZNMIX, 0.0717) was reproduced bit-for-bit in the same setup before applying the fix, isolating the phase as the only change.

toolkit_measurements.blind_spot: with signed masses the c_h(chi1,chi1) zero sits at theta = -0.152 and coincides exactly with paper Eq. 8 (m_chi1 + MPsi sin 2theta = 0), verified via Hellmann-Feynman dm_chi1/dv; the previously reported sigma_SI dip at theta = +0.79 was an artifact of the stripped Majorana phase
